abort.imported_to_existing_entry: YAML configuration was imported into the existing empty Elehant Water entry.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Elehant Water configuration entry is supported.

user.title: Elehant Water
user.description: Create an empty Elehant Water configuration entry. If you are migrating old YAML configuration, you can keep it in configuration.yaml: it will be imported automatically when Home Assistant loads.

error.invalid_json: The meter configuration must be valid JSON.
error.invalid_meters: The meter configuration must be a valid normalized meters array.
error.no_yaml_config: Legacy Elehant Water YAML configuration was not found in the loaded Home Assistant configuration.

init.title: Elehant Water options
init.description: You can import legacy YAML configuration captured during Home Assistant startup, or manually edit the normalized meters JSON.
